reference_librarian_queries.query: What is the current structure of agent-runner? Where are entry points and intake handlers?
reference_librarian_queries.answer_summary: agent-runner has run.py as entry point, workflow_inputs.py for input resolution, steps.py for stage orchestration. Synthetic fixture support infrastructure is already in place.

decisions_made: Consolidated validation and error handling into single task (T1) instead of separate validation task
Fixed test assertion issue in T2 (runner parameter mismatch in test_main_defaults_to_bundled_synthetic_fixture)
Reordered tasks to flow naturally: validate → route → create artifacts → downstream → integration → docs
Enhanced DoD items to be specific and measurable with concrete test names and file references
Set T5 (integration test) as high priority and critical dependency for T6 (documentation)

execution_blockers.resolution: Added fix to T2 DoD: assertion must expect runner='claude' parameter in step_intake() call

context_assessment: Codebase fully understood. Synthetic fixture infrastructure substantially complete. Test failures identified (1 of 15 tests fail due to assertion issue, not code logic). All ACs can be verified through existing infrastructure.

task_summary.T1: Verify and document fixture validation and error handling (high priority, simple complexity)
task_summary.T2: Fix and verify workflow routing for synthetic mode (high priority, simple complexity, includes test assertion fix)
task_summary.T3: Verify intake agent creates canonical artifacts (high priority, moderate complexity)
task_summary.T4: Verify downstream stages skip ADO operations (high priority, moderate complexity)
task_summary.T5: Add comprehensive integration test (high priority, moderate complexity)
task_summary.T6: Document synthetic workflow usage (low priority, simple complexity)

parallel_execution_groups.rationale: Independent validation and routing verification, no dependencies
Intake artifact verification, depends on T1/T2 completion
Downstream behavior verification, depends on T3
Integration test, depends on all core tasks T1-T3
Documentation, final task after all verification complete

improvements: Fixed test assertion issue identified in test output (runner parameter)
Consolidated validation task with better focus on AC2 requirements
Reordered tasks for natural workflow progression
Enhanced DoD with specific, measurable success criteria
Clarified task dependencies and parallel execution opportunities
Improved metacognitive context explaining iteration 2 changes
quality_checks: Test failure identified and resolved in T2
Estimated complexities realistic for fixture-based verification
